channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: What injured ankle? Ja Morant flies around court helping Grizzlies take West's 8th seed
item.description: MEMPHIS, Tenn. (AP) — Two-time All-Star Ja Morant promised a sprained right ankle wouldn't keep him out of Memphis' play-in game against Dallas with the Western Conference's last postseason berth up for grabs Friday night. Morant did more than just play.
item.dc:creator: CLAY BAILEY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Edman hits leadoff HR filling in for Ohtani and Yamamoto strikes out 10 as Dodgers beat Texas 3-0
item.description: ARLINGTON, Texas (AP) — Yoshinobu Yamamoto matched his career high with 10 strikeouts over seven innings after Tommy Edman led off the game with a home run and the Los Angeles Dodgers beat the Texas Rangers 3-0 on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Yankees' Jazz Chisholm Jr. suspended 1 game following ejection, violation of social media policy
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (AP) — New York Yankees second baseman Jazz Chisholm Jr. was suspended for one game and fined by Major League Baseball on Friday following his ejection during a game at the Tampa Bay Rays and violation of MLB’s social media policy.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Lindblad joins Buhai atop the leaderboard in the LPGA Tour's JM Eagle LA Championship
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Ingrid Lindblad took a share of the lead into the weekend at El Caballero Country Club in only the fourth start of her rookie season on the LPGA Tour.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Shohei Ohtani absent from Dodgers for birth of first child
item.description: MLB superstar Shohei Ohtani is away from the LA Dodgers for the birth of his first child, manager Dave Roberts told reporters on Friday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: NHL sets another attendance record, topping 23 million fans for the 1st time
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The NHL has set another attendance record and surpassed 23 million fans for the first time. The league on Friday reported an attendance figure of 23,014,458 over the 1,312-game regular season.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Stars and Avs in playoff-opening series of Cup favorites that has Mikko Rantanen on a different side
item.description: FRISCO, Texas (AP) — Mikko Rantanen was at ease Friday when talking about the excitement of starting the playoffs, which the standout forward experienced with the Colorado Avalanche each of the past seven seasons that included a Stanley Cup title.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Boston Marathon and city insist all are welcome. But some runners say politics will keep them home
item.description: The Boston Marathon and Mayor Michelle Wu insist that international runners and other foreign visitors remain welcome in the city.
item.dc:creator: Jimmy Golen, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Most California residents oppose trans inclusion in girls and women's sports: survey
item.description: A bipartisan survey found that most California residents oppose trans inclusion in girls and women's sports, including more than 70% of school parents.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Saints injured former All-Pro right tackle Ryan Ramczyk retires after missing entire 2024 season
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — Saints right tackle Ryan Ramczyk, a 2017 first-round draft choice and former All-Pro who sat out all of last season because of a lingering knee injury, has announced his retirement from pro football.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Kawhi Leonard is fresh in mind and body as the streaking Los Angeles Clippers open the playoffs
item.description: INGLEWOOD, Calif. (AP) — Kawhi Leonard is fresh in mind and body this year, no longer relegated to watching from the sideline when the Los Angeles Clippers begin the postseason.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Florida State sports alumni Brooks Koepka, Jared Verse, others react to deadly campus shooting
item.description: Former Florida State sports stars offered support to their fellow Seminoles after at least two people were killed in an on-campus shooting.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: IHSA upholds policy on transgender athletes, seeks clarity on state conflict with Trump order
item.description: The Illinois High School Association this week said it would keep in place its policy to allow transgender athletes to compete in high school sports competitions, despite an executive order from President Donald Trump, because the order may conflict with state law.
item.dc:creator: BJ Lutz, WGN 9

item.title: Devon Dampier ready to take the reigns
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - As spring practice wraps up this week for the Utah football team, new quarterback Devon Dampier is getting more and more comfortable. It helps having played in new offensive coordinator Jason Beck's system the last two seasons at New Mexico.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Professional soccer could be headed to the North Bay
item.description: (KRON) -- The next professional sports team in the Bay Area could be bound for the North Bay. The City of Santa Rosa announced it has entered into exclusive negotiations with the United Soccer League (USL) to explore the possibilities of bringing both a men's team and a women's team to the city.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KRON4

item.title: Cubs can't hold lead, MLB-best Padres surge late to win opening game of 3-game series in San Diego
item.description: SAN DIEGO (AP) — The Cubs' West Coast gauntlet against two of the best teams in baseball rolls on this week, with two games left.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Hear from Masters champion Rory McIlroy and longtime friend Tony Finau
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) -- Rory McIlroy won the Masters yesterday to become the sixth player to complete the career Grand Slam. It was a long time coming for the Irishman -- and nobody was happier for him than Tony Finau, who has known McIlrory for a long time. "It's quite cool.
item.dc:creator: Wesley Ruff, ABC 4

item.title: Chicago Sky select Ajsa Sivka, Hailey Van Lith in WNBA Draft
item.description: The Chicago Sky selected Slovenian stretch four Ajsa Sivka and TCU point guard Hailey Van Lith with their top two picks in the WNBA draft to address their need for perimeter shooting and to bolster their rebounding efforts.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Jazz close out season with 116-105 loss at Minnesota
item.description: MINNEAPOLIS (ABC4 Sports) - The NBA season has mercifully come to an end for the Utah Jazz. The Jazz ended the worst season in franchise history with a 116-105 loss to the Minnesota Timberwolves, who were led by Anthony Edwards with 43 points.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Bulls get ready for NBA play-in game with 122-102 win over 76ers in regular-season finale
item.description: Kevin Huerter hit five 3-pointers and scored 18 points and the Chicago Bulls warmed-up for the play-in game with a 122-102 win over the Philadelphia 76ers on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: 89th Masters Tournament
item.description: Roars for Rory. The famous sound of Sunday at the Masters Tournament could be for Rory McIlroy (-12) this year.
item.dc:creator: John Hart, WGN 9

item.title: Rory McIlroy has masterful start at Augusta and closes in on career Grand Slam
item.description: AUGUSTA, Ga. (AP) — The greatest start in the 91-year history of the Masters wasn't enough for Rory McIlroy. He delivered what looked to be a haymaker late Saturday afternoon, a 6-iron so majestic and pure that he walked 10 yards before he saw it land 6 feet away for eagle on the 15th hole.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Texas man suing NFL player over December shooting at car lot
item.description: A Texas man who says Titans cornerback L'Jarius Sneed or his personal assistant shot at him while he was sitting inside a Mercedes-Benz on a dealer lot in December is suing for at least $1 million.
item.dc:creator: Teresa M. Walker, NewsNation

item.title: Dodgers host the Cubs on 7-game home win streak
item.description: Chicago Cubs (9-7, second in the NL Central) vs. Los Angeles Dodgers (11-4, third in the NL West) Los Angeles; Saturday, 9:10 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9
